name: Curcuma Capsules
description: Turmeric exerts its effects through multiple biological mechanisms, including inhibition of the NF-κB signaling pathway, a key regulator of inflammation in the body; reduction of the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines such as IL-6, TNF-α, and IL-1β; and inhibition of COX-2 and lipoxygenase enzymes involved in gastrointestinal inflammation. Turmeric enhances bile secretion from the liver and gallbladder, resulting in more efficient fat digestion and reducing irritation of the gastrointestinal mucosa. Furthermore, it plays a significant role in balancing the gut microbiome by reducing the growth of pathogens and increasing the diversity of beneficial microorganisms.
dosage: Take 2-4 capsules (500 mg) 3-4 times daily. It is recommended to take them before meals or on an empty stomach, as the herbs are absorbed better when food is absent, leading to higher blood levels of active ingredients and increased efficacy. The herbs in this formula do not irritate the stomach.
category: Digestive system Liver detoxification Anti-inflammatory therapy Microbiome balance Metabolic health
tags: Anti-inflammatory regulation Hepatobiliary detoxification Digestive system restoration

name: ABSORN CAPSULE
description: ABSORN works through several key mechanisms: 1. Balancing the HPO axis (hypothalamus, pituitary ovary), which regulates female hormones; 2. Increasing pelvic blood flow, enhancing nitric oxide signaling, and improving uterine perfusion; 3. Reducing prostaglandins, a major cause of dysmenorrhea and uterine inflammation; 4. Reducing inflammatory cytokines such as IL-6, TNF-α, and IL-1β; and 5. Antitumor activity: the polyphenols and flavonoids in the formulation induce apoptosis, inhibit proliferation, and suppress inflammatory tumor microenvironments.
dosage: Take 2-4 capsules (500 mg) 3-4 times daily before meals or on an empty stomach to enhance absorption of the active ingredients.
ic50_data: The inhibitory activity of ABSORN MCF-7 extract on breast cancer cells was 251.8 ± 6.489 µg/mL (fraction results: 1000 µg/mL, 569.74 ± 6.36 µg/mL, 527 µg/mL); HeLa extract on cervical cancer cells was 151.05 ± 8.71 µg/mL (fraction: 180.8 ± 14.52 µg/mL); and Vero extract on normal cells was 500 µg/mL, indicating selective cytotoxicity against cancer cells.
category: Women reproductive health Hormonal balance Pelvic circulation Anti-inflammatory therapy Oncology microenvironment modulation
tags: Hormonal regulation Pelvic microcirculation enhancement Anti-inflammatory modulation Oncology microenvironment modulation

name: COMPOUND DERRIS SCANDENS CAPSULE
description: The herbal formula containing Tinospora cordifolia acts through several important mechanisms: Anti-inflammatory mechanisms, inhibiting the NF-κB pathway, COX-2 expression, and prostaglandin synthesis, thus reducing inflammation of joints and tissues; Microcirculation improvement, increasing blood flow to the joints and increasing oxygen supply; Cartilage protection, helping to reduce cartilage degeneration; and stimulating collagen synthesis.
dosage: Take 2-4 capsules (500 mg) 3-4 times daily before meals or on an empty stomach to enhance absorption of the active ingredients.
ic50_data: Based on the experimental data in the table, the extracts related to the *Tinospora crispa* formula have IC50 values ​​against some cancer cells, such as A549 (lung cancer) IC50 ≈ 76.24 ± 11.11 µg/mL, PC-3 (prostate cancer) IC50 ≈ 60.36 ± 8.46 µg/mL, SW480 (colon cancer) IC50 ≈ 341.98 ± 6.11 µg/mL, and normal cells (Vero) IC50 500 µg/mL, indicating selective cytotoxicity against cancer cells.
category: Joint and musculoskeletal system Anti-inflammatory therapy Pain management Connective tissue repair
tags: Anti-inflammatory regulation Cartilage protection Microcirculation enhancement

Mitochondrial function: Ginseng and Astragalus increase ATP production and mitochondrial respiration. 3. Immune modulation: Stimulates NK cell and T-cell response.

Digestive activation: Stimulating the secretion of gastric juice, pancreatic enzymes, and bile secretion, improving digestion and nutrient absorption. 2. Bioavailability enhancement: Piperine increases the absorption of important substances from food and herbs, and enhances intestinal permeability for bioactive compounds. 3. Metabolic activation: The herbs in the formula can stimulate the AMPK signaling pathway, a key regulator of glucose metabolism and fatty acid oxidation. 4. Anti-diabetic mechanism: The bioactive compounds in the formula increase insulin sensitivity, decrease insulin resistance, and increase glucose uptake in muscles.

name: YAVETCHAKORN NO.6 CAPSULE
description: This formula works through several mechanisms simultaneously, as follows: 5.1 Neurotransmitter support: The aromatic herbs and essential oils in the formula tend to help balance serotonergic tone, GABA-related calming pathways, cholinergic balance, and stress-response signaling, thus reducing tension, relaxing the brain, and promoting sleep. 5.2 Neurovascular regulation: The formula helps increase blood flow to the brain, improving oxygen supply to the brain, reducing dizziness, headaches, and vertigo caused by poor circulation, and supporting cognitive clarity. 5.3 Anti-stress/neuroendocrine modulation: It tends to help balance the brain–adrenal–sleep axis, reducing the effects of stress overload on the body. 5.4 Digestive-brain axis: The herbs in the formula also help relieve flatulence and bloating, which reduces the burden on gut-brain stress signaling and indirectly improves sleep. 5.5 Neuroprotection: Experiments on SH-SY5Y neurons showed that the Vatchakron group did not cause cell toxicity at the tested concentrations and tended to increase cell viability compared to the untreated control.
dosage: As per your previously prescribed regimen, take 2–4 capsules (500 mg/capsule) 3–4 times daily, before meals or on an empty stomach. This is mechanically to improve the absorption of the active ingredient and its volatile fraction during periods without food interference, and to help achieve more efficient levels of the active ingredient in the bloodstream.
safety: Based on current data, H-008 has a good safety profile as a traditional-use formula neuro-support formula and a non-cytotoxic formula. In particular, the SH-SY5Y data confirms that it did not cause neurotoxicity during the trials.
ic50_data: The experimental results, clearly extracted from the SH-SY5Y cell viability assay research file, involved testing Vatcha kron in combination with other products in human SH-SY5Y neurons for 48 hours.
category: Based on the product information, it should be categorized under: Brain and nervous system, Sleep/stress regulation, Heart and blood vessel support, Digestive support, Neuroendocrine balance.
tags: The three pillars of H-008 are: Pillar 1: Neuro-regulation
balancing the brain and nervous system; Pillar 2: Sleep restoration
and deeper sleep; and Pillar 3: Neurovascular circulation
increasing blood flow to the brain and vital organs.

description: The "Liver Protection – Detoxification – Fluid Clearance" formula works synergistically through detoxification (Phase I–III), autophagy clearance, fluid dynamics regulation, anti-inflammatory and anti-fibrosis effects.
